stats.heading: Tournament Statistics

topPlayers.title: Top Players by ELO
topPlayers.subtitle: Global rating across all tournament types

eloDistribution.title: Player ELO Distribution
eloDistribution.subtitle: Number of players per Skill Rating band (bucket size {{bucket}}).

stats.noData: No data available. Create a tournament to see statistics.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.intro: Configure core integrations, in-game defaults, and developer options.

webhook.title: MatchZy Webhook
webhook.description: MatchZy webhook URL that your CS2 servers can reach.
webhook.label: Webhook URL

steam.title: Steam Integration
steam.apiKeyHelper: Resolves Steam vanity URLs and player info. Leave blank to disable lookups.
steam.statusOk: Steam API key is set and reachable.
steam.statusNotConfigured: Steam API key is not set. Vanity URLs cannot be resolved until you add a key.
steam.statusUnreachable: Steam API key appears set but Steam could not be reached. Check your network or key.
steam.statusError: Failed to check Steam API status. Please try again.

mapSync.title: Map Synchronization
mapSync.description: Sync CS2 maps from the GitHub repository.
mapSync.success: Map sync completed! {{added}} new map(s) added, {{skipped}} already existed.
mapSync.rateLimit: GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Please try again in a few minutes. You can set GITHUB_TOKEN environment variable to increase the rate limit.
mapSync.rateLimitShort: GitHub API rate limit exceeded. Please try again in a few minutes.
mapSync.githubError: Unable to reach GitHub repository. Please check your internet connection and try again later.

chatDefaults.title: MatchZy Chat & Knife Defaults
chatDefaults.description: Configure in-game chat prefixes and default knife round behavior.
chatDefaults.chatPrefixHelper: Default: "[MAT]". Leave blank to reset to the default prefix.
chatDefaults.adminChatPrefixHelper: Default: "[ADMIN]". Leave blank to reset to the default admin prefix.
chatDefaults.knifeToggleLabel: Enable knife rounds by default for new matches (when sides are not pre-selected)
chatDefaults.knifeNote: Applies only when MatchZy would normally run a knife round; explicit side picks or shuffle-assigned sides are not changed.

ratings.title: Rating Updates
ratings.description: Control whether completed matches update player Skill Ratings. Disable this for events where an external system (for example your Excel sheet) is the source of truth for ratings.
ratings.toggleLabel: Update player ratings from completed matches
ratings.note: When disabled, all matches will still track stats (ADR, K/D, etc.), but player Skill Ratings will remain unchanged.

developer.title: Developer Options
developer.description: Local development helpers only; don't enable in production.
developer.simulateToggleLabel: Simulate matches (use bot-driven demo matches instead of real players)
developer.simulateNote: When enabled, generated MatchZy configs include "simulation": true for automated demo matches.
developer.timescaleDescription: Controls how fast simulated matches run. Higher values speed up bots and round flow. This only applies when simulation is enabled.
developer.timescaleWarning: Speeds above 2.0 can be a bit unstable and may cause odd bot behavior, but are fine to use for quick local testing.
developer.resetApiDescription: Danger zone: drops and recreates the entire database schema, then reinitializes default data (maps, map pools, etc.). Use only for local development. This is irreversible.
developer.resetApiSuccess: API and database reset successfully. All data has been wiped and defaults reinitialized.
developer.resetApiError: Failed to reset API and database. Check API logs for details.

resetApiDialog.title: Reset API & wipe all data?
resetApiDialog.description: This will drop and recreate the entire database schema. All tournaments, matches, players, teams, ratings, events, logs, and settings will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone. Continue?

resetDialog.title: Reset settings?
resetDialog.description: Reset all settings on this page back to defaults. Existing tournaments and servers are not changed, but new matches and lookups will use the default values. Continue?

welcome.heading: Create Tournament
welcome.chooseMethod: Choose how you'd like to create your tournament
welcome.createNewDescription: Start from scratch and configure all tournament settings manually

single_elimination.label: Single Elimination
single_elimination.description: One loss and you're out. Classic bracket format used in professional tournaments.

double_elimination.label: Double Elimination
double_elimination.description: Two losses to be eliminated. Teams get a second chance in the lower bracket.

round_robin.label: Round Robin
round_robin.description: Everyone plays everyone. Perfect for league-style competitions.

swiss.label: Swiss System
swiss.description: Similar records face each other. Balanced matchups throughout the tournament.

shuffle.label: Shuffle Tournament
shuffle.description: Players are dynamically shuffled into balanced teams each round. Individual player competition with ELO-based team balancing.

summary.info: Review your tournament settings and click "Create Tournament" when ready.
summary.estimatedVolume: Approximately {{matches}} match{{matches, plural, one {} other {es}}} over {{rounds}} round{{rounds, plural, one {} other {s}}} (best of {{mapsPerMatch}}, up to {{totalMaps}} map{{totalMaps, plural, one {} other {s}}} total).

emptyBracket.title: No bracket to display
emptyBracket.description: Create a tournament and generate the bracket to get started

empty.title: No matches to display
empty.description: Create a tournament and generate brackets to see matches here

bulkDelete.message: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} manual match{{suffix}}? This action cannot be undone.

manualMatchModal.title: Create Manual Match
manualMatchModal.description: Create a standalone match that is independent from the tournament bracket. The API will automatically allocate an available server for you.

saveTemplate.title: Save Match Template
saveTemplate.nameHelper: For example: BO1 Inferno knife, BO3 map pool, etc.
saveTemplate.description: Current maps, series format, CT side rule, veto toggle, knife mode, and players per team will be saved in this template.

chooseMode.heading: How would you like to create this match?

template.title: Choose template
template.description: Load a preset for maps, format, and rules, then choose the teams.
template.label: Match template
template.empty: No templates saved yet. Configure a match and save it as a template.

custom.title: Create new match
custom.description: Configure maps, rules, sides, and teams from scratch.

templatesPage.empty: No templates yet. Create your first template from the Tournament page.

delete.title: Delete Template
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete the template "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.inProgressOrCompleted: Cannot create tournament from template while a tournament is in progress or completed. Please delete or reset the current tournament first.
errors.alreadyExists: A tournament already exists. Please delete or reset the current tournament before creating a new one from a template.

mapPool.title: Map Pool
mapPool.vetoWarning: Veto formats (BO1/BO3/BO5) require exactly 7 maps. Currently selected: {{count}}

empty.title: No ELO Calculation Templates
empty.description: Create your first template to customize how player statistics influence ELO adjustments

delete.title: Delete ELO Template
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
delete.defaultProtected: The default "pure-win-loss" template cannot be deleted.

adjustment.none: Per‑match stat adjustment: none (0; result‑only ELO)
adjustment.uncapped: Per‑match stat adjustment: uncapped (use with care)
adjustment.range: Per‑match stat adjustment range: {{min}} to {{max}} ELO

importModal.title: Import ELO Templates from JSON
importModal.introTitle: Paste JSON with ELO template definitions below.
importModal.introBody: Expected format: array of templates with name, optional description, enabled, weights, maxAdjustment, and minAdjustment. If you omit id, it will be generated from the name.

editor.info: Configure how individual player statistics influence ELO adjustments. Weights are applied after OpenSkill calculates the base ELO change (win/loss). Positive weights increase ELO, negative weights decrease it.
editor.nameDefaultLocked: Default template name cannot be changed
editor.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional description of this template's purpose

weights.title: Stat Weights
weights.subtitle: Adjust the slider for each statistic. Value of 0 means no adjustment for that stat.

limits.title: Adjustment Limits (Optional)
limits.subtitle: Set maximum and minimum ELO adjustments per match to prevent extreme changes.
limits.maxHelper: Maximum positive ELO adjustment per match
limits.minHelper: Maximum negative ELO adjustment per match

devToolsPage.alert: These tools are only available in development mode. Use them to quickly generate test data for testing the application.

testTeams.title: Test Teams
testTeams.description: Create teams with random player data for testing tournament brackets and matches.

errors.partial: Created {{created}} team(s), but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.

testPlayers.title: Test Players
testPlayers.description: Create players with ELO ratings for testing shuffle tournaments and player management.
testPlayers.success: Successfully created {{created}} player(s){{updated, number} > 0 ? (', and updated ' + updated) : ''}}!

errors.partial: Created {{created}} player(s), updated {{updated}}, but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.

testServers.title: Test Servers
testServers.description: Create server configurations for testing match management and RCON commands.

errors.partial: Created {{created}} server(s), but {{failed}} failed. Check console for details.

deleteTestData.title: Delete Test Data
deleteTestData.description: Delete all test data (teams and servers with 'test-' prefix). This action cannot be undone.
deleteTestData.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to delete ALL test data?

wipeTable.title: Wipe Specific Tables
wipeTable.description: Delete all data from a specific table. Useful for cleaning up without resetting everything. Tables are organized by category.
wipeTable.confirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to wipe the {{table}} table? This will delete all data in that table.

simulation.title: Simulation State
simulation.description: Clear all matches and historical stats so you can click "Start Tournament" in simulation mode on a clean bracket, while keeping servers, teams, maps, and the current tournament setup.

reset.success: Simulation state reset. Matches and stats cleared; servers, teams, and tournament setup preserved.

adminToolsPage.title: Admin Tools
adminToolsPage.description: Run common match and server actions across your CS2 servers. Quick actions are shown first, with more advanced tools available below.
adminToolsPage.noServers: No enabled servers found. Please add and enable servers in the Servers page.

recovery.title: Match Recovery
recovery.description: If the API or servers were restarted during a tournament and match state looks out of sync (e.g. matches stuck in warmup or missing live scores), you can manually trigger a recovery pass. This will ask all servers for their current match report, resync scores/phases, and reconfigure webhooks and demo uploads where possible.
recovery.failedTrigger: Failed to trigger match recovery. Please try again.

info.title: Paste JSON with team data below.
info.format: Expected format: Array of teams with name, tag (optional), and players (name + steamId).

errors.mustBeArray: JSON must be an array of teams
errors.parseGeneric: Invalid JSON format. Please check your syntax.

preview.summary: ✓ Valid JSON! Found {{teamCount}} team{{teamCount, plural, one {} other {s}}} with {{playerCount}} total players.
preview.title: Preview:

info.description: Import players from JSON or CSV format. Required fields: steamId, name. Optional: initialELO (defaults to 1500), avatarUrl.

placeholders.jsonCsv:
JSON format:
[
  {
    "steamId": "76561198012345678",
    "name": "Player One",
    "initialELO": 1500,
    "avatarUrl": "https://..."
  }
]

CSV format:
steamId,name,initialELO,avatarUrl
76561198012345678,Player One,1500,https://...

preview.readyChip: {{count}} player{{count, plural, one {} other {s}}} ready to import
preview.title: Players to Import ({{count}}):
preview.name: Name: {{name}}

errors.parseFirst: Please parse and validate the data first

batchServerModal.info: Create multiple servers with ports incrementing by 10 (27015, 27025, 27035...). Perfect for LAN setups with servers on the same machine.

baseId.label: Base ID
baseId.helper: Server IDs will be: base_1, base_2, base_3...

baseName.label: Base Name
baseName.helper: Server names will be: Base #1, Base #2, Base #3...

enabled.label: Servers Enabled
enabled.helper: All servers will be created as enabled/disabled

warnings.notAllVerified: Some servers have not passed connectivity checks. They will be saved, but may appear offline until RCON and webhook are configured.

errors.countRange: Number of servers must be between 1 and 50

bulkShuffleMatchesModal.title: Bulk Create Shuffle Matches
bulkShuffleMatchesModal.description: Configure a single‑map shuffle match (map + round limit), then define as many head‑to‑head matches as you like by choosing exact player lineups for each side. Matches are created as part of the current shuffle tournament and will be allocated to servers when you start the tournament.

mapSelect.label: Map
mapSelect.noMaps: No maps configured for this tournament
mapSelect.helper: All matches in this batch will use this map.

maxRounds.label: Max rounds per map
maxRounds.helperWithValue: Match plays up to {{maxRounds}} rounds; winner is first to {{winRounds}} rounds.
maxRounds.helperDefault: Maximum number of rounds per map (default: 24, max: 30).

players.empty: No players are registered for this shuffle tournament yet. Register players first, then you can create manual matches.

matchRow.title: Match {{index}}
matchRow.mapOverrideHelperOwn: This match uses its own map.
matchRow.mapOverrideHelperDefault: Leave empty to use the default map above.
matchRow.maxRoundsOverrideHelperOwn: Overrides default max rounds for this match (currently {{value}}).
matchRow.maxRoundsOverrideHelperDefault: Leave empty to use the default max rounds above.

errors.noMatches: Add at least one match to create.
errors.bothTeamsRequired: Match {{index}}: both teams must have at least one player.
errors.conflictingPlayers: Match {{index}}: the same player cannot be on both teams. Conflicting ID(s): {{ids}}
errors.mapRequired: Match {{index}}: map is required (set a default map above or choose a map for this match).
errors.rowMaxRoundsRange: Match {{index}}: max rounds must be between 1 and 30 when overridden per match.
errors.globalMaxRoundsRange: Max rounds must be between 1 and 30.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create manual shuffle matches

success.created: Manual shuffle matches created. They will be allocated when the tournament starts.

soundSettingsModal.footer: Sound notifications will play when your match is ready or when important events occur.
